name: Turkish Style Chicken
recipeIngredient: breast and wings, cut into 12 pieces
3 large tomatoes, peeled, seeded and chopped
1 cup Kalamata olives, pitted and diced
2 tablespoons white raisins, soaked in boiling water for 30 minutes.
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the skin from the chicken pieces.
2. Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
3. Cook the chicken in oil. Remove pieces as they brown. They should be almost cooked at this point. If they are not, turn down the heat and continue cooking.
4. Add onions to the oil left in the pan and cook until soft. Add garlic, bayleaf, and ground coriander.
5. Stir in rice until well coated with the oil.
6. Add bell peppers and cook a few minutes.
7. Stir in tomatoes, cumin, and saffron.
8. Add raisins.
9. Return chicken pieces to the pan.
10. Pour 2 cups boiling chicken stock into the pan.
11. Cover the pan and turn down the heat. Simmer for 10 minutes.
12. Add olives and continue simmering for 10 to 15 minutes until rice is cooked.
13. Add a few drops of Tabasco sauce.
14. Serve hot.
